'''[https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCe31NPEeRGO0hcznx6Tdb-g/ BattleGrounds Mobile India]''' to commemorate the 75th Indian Independence Day present an invitational tournament called the "'''Freedom Face Off'''". The tournament will feature 16 invited teams who will compete for a prize pool of ₹2,10,000 {{Abbr/INR}}.

==About==
===Broadcast Talent===
{{box|start|padding=1em}}
{{BroadcasterCard
|position=Hindi Commentator|lang=in
|b1=Mazy
|b2=Mayavi|b2flag=in|b2name=Shubham Chawla
}}
{{box|end|padding=1em}}

===Format===
'''''Freedom Face Off:''' 15th August 2021.''
* ''16 Teams ''
* ''Maps: {{Abbr/TPP}} [[Erangel]] and {{Abbr/FPP}} [[Sanhok]] ''
* ''4 Matches to be played back to back (Including One Pan Fight and One Fist Fight).''
